---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened, including error messages and stack traces.

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or a video to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17, Firefox 126)
- **App Version:** (e.g. v2.0.0)
- **Device:** (e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, Desktop)
- **Node Version:** (e.g. 18.20.0)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem here (e.g. only happens when logged in as admin, only on mobile, etc.).

## Possible Fix

If you have an idea how to fix this bug, describe it here (optional).
